segments.text: The damage gap is showing now!
segments.original_text: パーセントももうこの差がついてきているぞ

segments.text: He went for the up smash to stop it, but threw out nair early to shut down the spin
segments.original_text: 上スマで止めに行ったが早めに空Nを出してスピンを止めていく

segments.text: Yellow Pikmin's giving some solid hitboxes there
segments.original_text: 今黄色ピクミンだったんでかなり判定持ち優秀だったと思うんですけど

segments.text: Black Ship threw it out even earlier with nair
segments.original_text: そこをさらに1個手前で空N通していった黒船選手
素晴らしい前慣性です

segments.text: A matchup where both players' momentum game is shining
segments.original_text: さあお互いに前慣性が光る試合展開の中

segments.text: Who's gonna secure that final stock?
segments.original_text: 先に最終ストック手をかけるのはどちらになるか

segments.text: The KO is in sight for Sonic
segments.original_text: もうソニック側も撃墜見えてますね

segments.text: At the ledge, looking for that bair
segments.original_text: ここの崖どうにか空中後ろを狙いつつ
展開は続いていますよ

segments.text: Going back to that bair option over and over
segments.original_text: 本命択の空中後ろをこれでもかと見せながら
この崖でさらなるリターンを求めていきます
どうにかして撃墜をお互いに取りたい

segments.text: Wraps around that bair with the forward tilt
segments.original_text: 空後の間に裏に回って横強

segments.text: He got out with DI but...
segments.original_text: ベクトル変更でこれをかいくぐりましたが

full_text: The damage gap is showing now! He went for the up smash to stop it, but threw out nair early to shut down the spin. Yellow Pikmin's giving some solid hitboxes there. Black Ship threw it out even earlier with nair. Incredible momentum preservation! A matchup where both players' momentum game is shining. Who's gonna secure that final stock? The KO is in sight for Sonic. At the ledge, looking for that bair. And the action continues. Going back to that bair option over and over. Stock chase situation. Looking for more at ledge. Both want that KO. The tension is real! Wraps around that bair with the forward tilt. Dealing with blue Pikmin. One nair. He got out with DI but...

corrections.reason: 空中ニュートラル攻撃の略称
前慣性（移動慣性を利用した技術）
本命択（メインの選択肢）
